subject: Fix SDNC DMAAP consumer properties in HELM charts
commit_message:
Fix SDNC DMAAP consumer properties in HELM charts

Minor configuration changes required in 3 SDNC DMAAP
listener/consumer properties

Issue-ID: OOM-2400

Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I329d0cb6e7f706ff3ad22eabdbcce442a9c56410

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Azure 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Note : this is actually a cherry pick of the following change:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/107449

Unfortunately, since that change is closed, git review rejects this change unless I remove the Change-ID footer - breaking the relationship link.  I tried several times to preserve the link, after a previous -1 due to this not being shown as a cherry pick, but to no avail.  It appears removing the Change-ID is the only option.

This fix is needed by the SDN-R team.  I'd appreciate your merging it at your earliest convenience.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Hello,
I’m sorry Dan but you need first to make a review on master then cherry pick it to Frankfurt. 

If you have already done this review on master, we’ll merge this one when the one on master gets merged.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Hello,
> I’m sorry Dan but you need first to make a review on master then cherry pick it to Frankfurt. 
> 
> If you have already done this review on master, we’ll merge this one when the one on master gets merged.
This actually is a cherry pick - see my earlier comment for the link and detailed explanation.  I had to remove the change-id footer to get gerrit to accept the push, which breaks the link.

Patch Set 1:

> This actually is a cherry pick - see my earlier comment for the link and detailed explanation.  I had to remove the change-id footer to get gerrit to accept the push, which breaks the link.

Oh, my bad!
I was on my phone and didn't saw the earlier message!
